prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mastery VFX sheet for Orbwalker
Primary request: create a production candidate sprite sheet for elemental mastery beams, shells, and impact feedback.
Subject: twelve small VFX sprites in a 4x3 sheet: fire beam, ice beam, earth beam, heart heal beam, armor shell, gold sparkle beam, hit impact, heal impact, shield pulse, coin burst, mastery charge ring, small trail particle.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game VFX sprites, crisp mobile readability.
Composition/framing: 4x3 sheet with each effect centered and padded.
Lighting/mood: clear source-to-target magic feedback without covering the board.
Color palette: elemental colors, white highlights, gold accents.
Constraints: PNG with REAL transparent alpha background. The final file must contain true alpha transparency around and between sprites. No checkerboard, no white/gray/black backdrop, no fake transparency preview grid, no rectangular matte, no frame, no panel, no labels, no text, no logo, no watermark, no gore, no casino imagery.
